brief_text:
**SECURITY BRIEF — Week of Dec 21–Dec 27**
*(Data updated Jan 22 — typical 21-day reporting delay)*

**Status:** NORMAL — Activity 15% below average
59 property incidents in Hollywood Division this week.
*(NIBRS counts each offense separately; counts may appear higher than legacy reports)*

**Incident Breakdown:**
• Vehicle Security: 20 incidents (33%)
• Residential Security: 5 incidents (8%)
• Other Property: 34 incidents (57%)

Tracking 39% below same week last year (59 vs 97).
Patterns detected: Vehicle Security (10 in 72h); Other Property (26 in 72h); Residential Security (5 in 72h).
